channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Trump’s aggressive approach stalls negotiations with Iran amid ongoing crisis
item.description: US President Donald Trump’s return to office has been marked by a familiar approach of tough, high-stakes diplomacy, which has yielded results in areas like trade and certain military conflicts. Howev...

item.title: Manchester City Wins FA Cup Final Against Chelsea with Semenyo’s Decisive Goal
item.description: In a tightly contested FA Cup final at Wembley Stadium, Manchester City defeated Chelsea 1-0 thanks to an audacious goal from Antoine Semenyo. The Ghanaian forward, who joined City from Bournemouth in...

item.title: Nigerian and US Forces Confirm Death of ISWAP Commander Al-Muniki
item.description: The Nigerian presidency don clarify say the earlier report wey claim say Islamic State West Africa Province (ISWAP) leader Abu-Bilal Al-Muniki don die for 2024 no correct. The confusion come from wron...

item.title: The Relationship Journey of Eric Clapton and Pattie Boyd in the 1970s
item.description: During the 1970s, Eric Clapton and Pattie Boyd's relationship evolved from unrequited love to a high-profile marriage that captured rock history. Initially, Clapton, deeply enamored with Boyd while sh...

item.title: Nairobi Woman Hospitalised After Alleged Acid Attack by Unknown Men
item.description: A Nairobi woman, Racheal Wandeto from Mwiki, Kasarani, is in hospital after an alleged brutal attack by three masked men. Racheal had gained attention for tattooing President William Ruto’s face on he...

item.title: Teenage Rob Lowe’s Early TV Debut in ABC Sitcom ‘A New Kind of Family’
item.description: Before becoming a household name and part of the iconic 'Brat Pack,' Rob Lowe made his television debut at the age of 15 in the short-lived ABC sitcom 'A New Kind of Family' (1979–1980). In the show, ...

item.title: Addressing Hypertension in South Africa: From Awareness to Effective Control
item.description: High blood pressure is a major health threat in South Africa, contributing to strokes, heart disease, kidney failure, and premature deaths. The critical problem is not merely awareness of hypertension...

item.title: Rare Kobe Bryant Basketball Card Anticipated to Sell for Over $500,000 USD
item.description: A rare basketball card featuring the late NBA legend Kobe Bryant is expected to fetch over US$500,000 at an upcoming auction, making it more expensive than many starter homes in North America. Collect...

item.title: Jean-Louis Guégan and His Iconic Photography of 1960s-70s French Fashion
item.description: Jean-Louis Guégan was a celebrated French fashion photographer who left an indelible mark on the visual culture of the 1960s and 1970s. Renowned for his extensive work with the magazine L’Officiel de ...

item.title: The Cultural Significance of Women Smoking in Mid-20th Century Photography
item.description: In the mid-20th century, cigarettes became more than just a smoking habit—they were a symbol of style, sophistication, and social rebellion, particularly among women. Between the 1940s and 1960s, imag...

item.title: Union Minister Bandi Sanjay cooperates with police as his son faces POCSO investigation
item.description: Union Minister Bandi Sanjay Kumar on Saturday publicly stated that he has cooperated fully with the authorities by ensuring that his son, Bandi Bhageerath, appeared before the police in connection wit...

item.title: FIA Chief Orders Inquiry into Karachi Sarafa Bazaar Raid Over Alleged Silver Smuggling
item.description: ISLAMABAD: The Director General of Federal Investigation Agency (FIA) Dr Usman Anwar has taken serious notice of the raid conducted on a jewellery shop in Karachi’s famous Sarafa Bazaar on May 15, 202...

item.title: Maribel Irungu's Sister Speaks Out on Funeral Arrangements and Family Grief
item.description: Following the tragic passing of TikToker Maribel Irungu on May 13, her sister Hafsa Wangui has broken her silence to mourn and guide the public on funeral arrangements. Maribel, known for her bold opi...

item.title: Xabi Alonso Set to Take Over as Chelsea Head Coach on Four-Year Deal
item.description: Chelsea Football Club don finish another season without winning any trophy, even after dem lift two titles last year. As e be, di club management don dey plan major changes for di future. According to...

item.title: Anthrax announce new album ‘Cursum Perficio’ after decade-long wait and release lead single ‘It’s For The Kids’
item.description: American thrash metal legends Anthrax have announced their first studio album in ten years, titled ‘Cursum Perficio’, which is set for release on 18 September via Megaforce Records. The band, who last...

item.title: Myrna Dell and Her Enduring Legacy in Classic Hollywood
item.description: Myrna Dell (1924–2011) was a prominent actress during Hollywood's Golden Age, celebrated for her striking beauty, elegance, and versatility. She began her career as a showgirl in the Earl Carroll Revu...

item.title: Patrick Radden Keefe Explores Russian Influence in London Through the Case of Zac Brettler
item.description: Patrick Radden Keefe, celebrated New Yorker staff writer and acclaimed non-fiction author, has released his latest book, London Falling, which examines the suspicious death of 19-year-old Zac Brettler...

item.title: U.S. and Nigerian Forces Kill Senior Islamic State Leader in Coordinated Operation
item.description: U.S. and Nigerian military forces successfully killed Abu Bakr al-Mainuki, a senior Islamic State (IS) leader, in a joint operation in Nigeria's Lake Chad Basin. President Donald Trump announced the s...

item.title: Kurt Russell’s Transformative Portrayal of Elvis Presley in the 1979 TV Movie
item.description: Kurt Russell’s role as Elvis Presley in the 1979 TV movie 'Elvis' marked a pivotal moment in his acting career and began his long-standing collaboration with director John Carpenter. Airing on ABC and...

item.title: DTB engages European investors as Tanzania attracts more investment
item.description: Dar es Salaam, Tanzania – Diamond Trust Bank (DTB) recently hosted a delegation of European investors to showcase Tanzania's growing investment opportunities. The meeting highlighted the country’s str...
